background.prompt: Hero background `.mesh-dusk`: animated soft brand mesh (no photo).
background.css: @keyframes flo_dusk{0%,100%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}}.mesh-dusk{background:radial-gradient(60% 80% at 25% 20%,color-mix(in srgb,var(--primary) 14%,transparent),transparent),radial-gradient(55% 65% at 80% 15%,color-mix(in srgb,var(--accent) 18%,transparent),transparent),radial-gradient(70% 70% at 60% 90%,color-mix(in srgb,var(--primary) 8%,transparent),transparent),var(--bg);background-size:160% 160%;animation:flo_dusk 16s ease infinite;}
